action_set_definitions.name: get_vehicle_status
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves the current basic state of the vehicle including ignition status and engine state.

action_set_definitions.name: get_power_system_health
action_set_definitions.description: Measures battery voltage and checks the health/integrity percentage of the primary power supply systems.

action_set_definitions.name: get_component_integrity_report
action_set_definitions.description: Returns a detailed report of the health percentage (0-100) for all control modules and wiring components.

action_set_definitions.name: get_active_dtcs
action_set_definitions.description: Scans the vehicle for active Diagnostic Trouble Codes.

action_set_definitions.name: measure_pt_can_metrics
action_set_definitions.description: Measures PT-CAN bus load percentage and termination resistance.

action_set_definitions.name: repair_component
action_set_definitions.description: Restores a component's integrity to 100% or replaces a faulty ECU.

component_id.description: The ID of the component to repair or replace (e.g., 'battery', 'ECM', 'wiring_harness').

action_set_definitions.name: isolate_node_power
action_set_definitions.description: Cuts or restores power to a specific ECU node for diagnostic isolation.

action_set_definitions.name: clear_fault_codes
action_set_definitions.description: Clears all 'U' and 'P' series codes from the vehicle memory.

state_description.ignition_status: Current position of the ignition switch: OFF, ACC, ON, START.
state_description.engine_running: Whether the internal combustion engine is currently rotating and firing.
state_description.active_dtcs: A list of active Diagnostic Trouble Codes stored in the ECU.
state_description.component_integrity: The health percentage (0-100) of various vehicle components.
state_description.circuit_resistance_ohms: Specific electrical resistance values for wiring harnesses.
